title: Redesign dashboard (/) — replace static text with operational metrics and CTAs
acceptance_criteria: Dashboard shows 4 metric cards with live counts: Projects (1), Boards (1), Tasks (3), Approvals (1 pending) — values sourced from the vault read model, not hardcoded
When pendingApprovals.length > 0, an amber-highlighted section with 'X pending approvals' appears with a CTA link to /approvals
A prominent 'Open Board' button/link navigates to /boards/board-demo (derived from vault data, not hardcoded)
The 'Board flow' section shows the 4 column names (Todo / In Progress / Review / Done) as a visual step indicator, not a static numbered list
The static 'Projects', 'Tasks', 'Approvals', 'Audit' info-dump sections are removed or collapsed into the metrics cards
The page renders without errors and all links navigate correctly
completion_summary: Reworked the dashboard into a live operational surface with vault-derived metrics, pending-approval CTA, board CTA, and a visual board-flow indicator.
